command: set -a; source .env.hardening; set +a; pnpm exec vitest run tests/integration/pos-p0-verification.test.ts

issues.evidence: A Store-A1-only Manager retrieved Store A2 shifts, X-report, return, debt, POS receipt, and fiscal receipt records; database row counts were unchanged by reads.
A Store-A1-only Cashier persisted Store A2 marking, cash movement, return draft, and debt settlement/payment records.
A Manager created a register, a Cashier closed a shift, and a Staff user completed a return; actor IDs and terminal states persisted.
A second Cashier completed another Cashier's active and held drafts without resume; createdById, updatedById, and payment attribution changed to the second Cashier.
Two stale quantity-5 returns completed against one quantity-5 sale; returned quantity and stock delta were 10, refund was KGS 1000, and on-hand rose from 5 to 15.
A shift closed while an active unheld draft remained; later completion returned posShiftClosed and created no payment.
A register with an open shift and active draft was deactivated; the open records remained while POS entry and active-register selectors omitted the register.
A store configured with allowNegativeStock=false completed a quantity-2 sale from no snapshot and persisted onHand=-2 with snapshot allowNegativeStock=true.
Gated concurrent manual and worker retries invoked the deterministic mock adapter twice for one receipt; attemptCount reached 3 after the initial failed attempt.

remaining: Browser validation at required roles, viewports, and themes
